name: Chett
description: Chett is a steward of the Night's Watch. Before he was sent to the Wall, he was a leechman's son in the riverlands. He is the POV character in the prologue of A Storm of Swords.

name: Jon Connington
description: Jon Connington, also known as Griff, was the Lord of Griffin's Roost, the head of House Connington, towards the end of the reign of King Aerys II Targaryen. He served for a short time as Hand of the King to Aerys during Robert's Rebellion.

name: Cressen
description:
Cressen is a maester of the Citadel in service to Stannis Baratheon, Lord of Dragonstone. He is the POV character in the prologue of A Clash of Kings.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Cressen is portrayed by Oliver Ford Davies.

name: Duncan the Tall
description: Duncan the Tall was a knight during the reigns of Kings Daeron II, Aerys I, Maekar I, and Aegon V Targaryen. Raised as Dunk in Flea Bottom, he became the squire of a hedge knight, Ser Arlan of Pennytree. Duncan then traveled the Seven Kingdoms as a hedge knight himself, with the young Prince Aegon, called "Egg", as his squire. The early exploits of "Dunk and Egg" are chronicled in A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms, which collects The Hedge Knight, The Sworn Sword, and The Mystery Knight. Duncan the

name: Merrett Frey
description: Merrett Frey is a member of House Frey and a POV character in the epilogue of A Storm of Swords. Merrett is the ninth son of Lord Walder Frey and the fourth son born of Walder's marriage to Amarei Crakehall.

name: Aeron Greyjoy
description:
Aeron Greyjoy is the youngest surviving son of the late Lord Quellon Greyjoy and Lady Sunderly, and is a younger brother of Balon Greyjoy, Lord of the Iron Islands. As a result of a near-death experience, Aeron became a priest of the Drowned God, and he is now called the Damphair because of his wet hair. His acolytes are known as the drowned men.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Aeron is portrayed by Michael Feast.

name: Asha Greyjoy
description:
Asha Greyjoy is a member of House Greyjoy, and is the daughter of Lord Balon Greyjoy by his wife, Alannys Harlaw. She becomes a POV character in A Feast For Crows.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, she is renamed Yara Greyjoy to avoid confusion with the wildling Osha, and portrayed by Gemma Whelan.

name: Theon Greyjoy
description:
Theon Greyjoy is a member of House Greyjoy and is the sole surviving son and heir apparent of Balon Greyjoy, Lord of the Iron Islands. At the end of Greyjoy's Rebellion, Theon was taken to Winterfell as a hostage and ward to Lord Eddard Stark. He becomes a POV character in A Clash of Kings.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Theon is portrayed by Alfie Allen.

name: Victarion Greyjoy
description: Victarion Greyjoy is a member of House Greyjoy and is a younger brother of Balon Greyjoy, Lord of the Iron Islands. Victarion is the Lord Captain of the Iron Fleet, and his flagship is the Iron Victory.

name: Areo Hotah
description:
Areo Hotah is the captain of the household guard at Sunspear for the Prince of Dorne, Doran Martell. He is originally from the Free City of Norvos, where he was trained by the bearded priests.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Areo is portrayed by DeObia Oparei.

name: Cersei Lannister
description:
Queen Cersei Lannister is the only daughter and eldest child of Lord Tywin Lannister of Casterly Rock and his wife, Lady Joanna Lannister. She is the twin of her younger brother, Ser Jaime Lannister.
After Robert's Rebellion, Cersei married King  Robert I Baratheon and became Queen of the Seven Kingdoms. She is the mother of Prince Joffrey, Princess Myrcella, and Prince Tommen of House Baratheon of King's Landing. Cersei becomes a POV character in A Feast for Crows.
In the television adaptation

name: Jaime Lannister
description:
Jaime Lannister, also known as the Kingslayer, is a knight from House Lannister. He is the second child and first-born son of Lord Tywin Lannister of Casterly Rock and his wife, Lady Joanna, also of House Lannister. He is the twin brother of Queen Cersei Lannister.
Raised at the age of fifteen to the Kingsguard of the Mad King, Aerys II Targaryen, Jaime became the youngest member in the history of the prestigious knightly order. He earned the derogatory nickname "Kingslayer" when he treasonously

name: Kevan Lannister
description:
Kevan Lannister is a knight from House Lannister and is the younger brother of Tywin Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock. He is the POV character for the epilogue of A Dance with Dragons.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Kevan is portrayed by Ian Gelder.

name: Tyrion Lannister
description:
Tyrion Lannister is a member of House Lannister and is the third and youngest child of Lord Tywin Lannister and the late Lady Joanna Lannister. His older siblings are Cersei Lannister, the queen of King Robert I Baratheon, and Ser Jaime Lannister, a knight of Robert's Kingsguard.
Tyrion is a dwarf; because of this he is sometimes called the Imp and the Halfman. He is one of the major POV characters in the books.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tyrion is portrayed by Peter Dinklage.

name: Arianne Martell
description: Princess Arianne Nymeros Martell, better known simply as Arianne Martell, is a member of House Martell and is the eldest daughter of Doran Martell, the ruling Prince of Dorne, and his consort, Lady Mellario of the Free City of Norvos. According to Dornish customs, she is the heiress of Sunspear, and the future ruling Princess of Dorne. Arianne is a POV character in A Feast for Crows and The Winds of Winter.

name: Quentyn Martell
description: Prince Quentyn Nymeros Martell, better known simply as Quentyn Martell, is a knight from House Martell. He is the second child and eldest son of Doran Martell, Prince of Dorne, and Lady Mellario of Norvos.

name: Melisandre
description:
Melisandre is a red priestess of R'hllor and a shadowbinder, hailing from the city of Asshai in the Further East of Essos. She has joined the court of Stannis Baratheon, Lord of Dragonstone, believing him to be Azor Ahai reborn, a hero destined to defeat the Great Other. She has become an influential advisor to him and his family. She becomes a POV character in A Dance with Dragons.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Melisandre is portrayed by Carice van Houten.

name: Arys Oakheart
description: Arys Oakheart is a knight from House Oakheart and a member of the Kingsguard of Robert I Baratheon. Arys is the youngest son of Lady Arwyn Oakheart of Old Oak. He becomes a POV character in A Feast for Crows.

name: Pate (novice)
description: Pate is a novice of the Citadel. He is the POV Character of the Prologue of A Feast for Crows.

name: Davos Seaworth
description:
Davos Seaworth, commonly called the Onion Knight, and sometimes Davos Shorthand, is the head of House Seaworth. He was once a smuggler, but after Robert's Rebellion he became a landed knight and Stannis Baratheon's most honest and loyal supporter. Davos created his own house sigil, a black ship with an onion on the sails upon a grey field. Davos becomes a POV character starting with A Clash of Kings.
Davos captains Black Betha. He has seven sons, many of them serving on ships in Stannis's fleet.

name: Barristan Selmy
description:
Barristan Selmy, called Barristan the Bold, is a knight from House Selmy and the Lord Commander of the Kingsguard of Robert I Baratheon. A celebrated hero, he has served in the Kingsguard since a time when these knights were still considered to be the greatest of the Seven Kingdoms. Barristan becomes a POV character in A Dance with Dragons.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Barristan is portrayed by Ian McElhinney.

name: Jon Snow
description:
Jon Snow is the bastard son of Eddard Stark, Lord of Winterfell. He has five half-siblings: Robb, Sansa, Arya, Bran, and Rickon Stark. Unaware of the identity of his mother, Jon was raised at Winterfell. At the age of fourteen, Jon joins the Night's Watch, where he earns the nickname Lord Snow. Jon is one of the major POV characters in A Song of Ice and Fire.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Jon is portrayed by Kit Harington.

name: Arya Stark
description:
Arya Stark is the third child and second daughter of Lord Eddard Stark and Lady Catelyn Tully. A member of House Stark, she has five siblings: brothers Robb, Bran, Rickon, half-brother Jon Snow, and older sister Sansa. Arya is one of the major POV characters in A Song of Ice and Fire.
Like some of her siblings, Arya sometimes dreams that she is a direwolf. Her own direwolf is Nymeria, who is named in reference to the Rhoynar warrior-queen of the same name.
In the television adaptation Game of Th

name: Bran Stark
description:
Brandon Stark, typically called Bran, is the second son of Lord Eddard Stark and Lady Catelyn Tully. He is one of the major POV characters in the books. He has four older siblings—Robb, Jon, Sansa, Arya—and one younger—Rickon. Like his siblings, he is constantly accompanied by his direwolf, Summer, with whom he shares a strong warg connection. He is seven years old at the beginning of A Game of Thrones.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Bran is portrayed by Isaac Hempstead-Wright.

name: Catelyn Stark
description:
Catelyn Stark, née Tully, is the wife of Eddard Stark, Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North. Together they have five children: Robb, Sansa, Arya, Bran, and Rickon. Catelyn is known as Cat to close family and friends.
Catelyn was born into House Tully of Riverrun, the liege lords of the riverlands. She is the eldest daughter of Lord Hoster Tully and Lady Minisa Whent, and has two younger siblings: Lysa and Ser Edmure. She is a major POV character in the books.
In the television adaptation G

name: Eddard Stark
description:
Eddard Stark, also called "Ned", is the head of House Stark, Lord of Winterfell, and Warden of the North. He is a close friend to King Robert I Baratheon, with whom he was raised. Eddard is one of the major POV characters in A Song of Ice and Fire.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Eddard is portrayed by Sean Bean, Sebastian Croft (as a child), and Robert Aramayo (as a young man).

name: Sansa Stark
description:
Sansa Stark is a noblewoman of House Stark and is the elder daughter of Lady Catelyn and Lord Eddard Stark. She has three brothers: Robb, Bran and Rickon; a younger sister: Arya; and a half-brother: Jon Snow. Sansa Stark is one of the major POV characters in the books.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Sansa is portrayed by Sophie Turner.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
description:
Daenerys Targaryen, also known as Daenerys Stormborn, is one of the last confirmed members of House Targaryen, along with her older brother Viserys, who refers to her as Dany. She is the youngest child of King Aerys II Targaryen and his sister-wife, Queen Rhaella. She is one of the major POV characters in A Song of Ice and Fire.
In the television adaptations Game of Thrones and House of the Dragon, Daenerys is portrayed respectively by Emilia Clarke and Imogen Ruby Little. She was previously pla

name: Samwell Tarly
description:
Samwell Tarly is the eldest son of Lord Randyll Tarly and his wife, Lady Melessa Florent. A recruit of the Night's Watch originally from House Tarly, he is popularly called Sam. He becomes a POV character in A Storm of Swords.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Samwell is portrayed by John Bradley.

name: Brienne Tarth
description:
Brienne Tarth, commonly called Brienne of Tarth after her island home, is the only living child and heir of Lord Selwyn Tarth of Evenfall. Brienne is sometimes called the Maid of Tarth and mocked as Brienne the Beauty.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Brienne is portrayed by Gwendoline Christie.

name: Varamyr
description: Varamyr, better known as  Varamyr Sixskins, is a member of the free folk, and a skinchanger who controls three wolves, a snow bear, a shadowcat, and an eagle. He was known as Lump until he took the name Varamyr.

name: Will
description:
Will is a ranger of the Night's Watch. He is the POV character for the prologue of A Game of Thrones.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Will is portrayed by Bronson Webb.

name: Cave dwellers
description: Cave dwellers or cave-dwellers are clans of free folk that live in the caverns of the Frostfangs, surrounding Thenn.

name: Free folk
description:
The free folk are a race of people who live beyond the Wall in northern Westeros. They are more commonly referred to as "wildlings" everywhere south of the Wall.
Free folk are split into countless cultures, tribes, clans, villages, and raiding parties, some reasonably cultured, others savage and hostile.

name: Hornfoots
description: The Hornfoots are a clan of free folk who live beyond the Wall near the Frostfangs.

name: Ice-river clans
description: The ice-river clans are clans of free folk who live near the great ice rivers beyond the Wall, north of the Frozen Shore and south of the Lands of Always Winter. They are said to feast on human flesh.

name: King of the Wildlings
description: King of the Wildlings is a title attributed to Gerrick Kingsblood, a free folk raider who boasts descent from Raymun Redbeard, a past King-Beyond-The-Wall.

name: King-Beyond-the-Wall
description:
King-Beyond-the-Wall, or King-beyond-the-Wall, or King Beyond the Wall, is the title given to a person who has united the many tribes of free folk (or wildlings) who dwell beyond the Wall. Despite its name, the title is not a hereditary or absolute position. It is not a position of any authority except that of the person who can establish it through persuasion and force. For long periods of time there have been no recognized kings.
The free folk leaders have been described in Maester Herryk's Hi

name: Kissed by fire
description: Kissed by fire or fire-kissed are terms used by the free folk to describe people with red hair.

name: Men of the Frozen Shore
description: The men of the Frozen Shore are a culture of free folk who inhabit the Frozen Shore, west of the Frostfangs.

name: Aemon Steelsong
description: Aemon Steelsong is the name to be given to the free folk son of Mance Rayder and his wife Dalla when he is two years of age.

name: Alfyn Crowkiller
description: Alfyn, also known as Alfyn Crowkiller, is an infamous wildling leader. He has at least four sons.

name: Arson Iceaxe
description: Arson Iceaxe was a wildling raider.

name: Bael the Bard
description:
Bael the Bard was a King-Beyond-the-Wall. According to legend, he was one of the greatest free folk raiders of his time, a man who outwitted the northmen and impregnated the daughter of Lord Brandon Stark. He was also a singer who wrote songs about his own life, which are still sung to this day.
There are questions as to whether Bael ever truly existed. While the wildlings say he did, attributing many of their songs to him, the old chronicles of Winterfell do not mention him at all. Whether this

name: Big Boil
description: Big Boil is a member of the free folk.

name: Black Maris
description: Black Maris is a spearwife of the free folk.

name: Blind Doss
description: Blind Doss is a free folk leader.

name: Bodger
description: Bodger is a young raider of the free folk.

name: Borroq
description: Borroq is a free folk skinchanger who can inhabit the body of a boar.

name: Briar
description: Briar was a female wildling skinchanger who could inhabit the body of a shadowcat.

name: Brogg
description: Brogg is a free folk leader.

name: Bump
description: Bump was the younger brother of Varamyr Sixskins and Meha. He was attacked and killed by dogs.

name: Butts
description: Butts is one of the wildlings who Jon Snow allows to cross the Wall and settle in Mole's Town.

name: Craster
description:
Craster is a wildling and is the master of Craster's Keep, located beyond the Wall. Despite his unsavory reputation, he is regarded as a friend to the Night's Watch.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Craster is portrayed by Robert Pugh.

name: Craster's sons
description: Craster's sons are the sons of the wildling Craster and his wives.

name: Craster's wives
description: Craster's wives are nineteen free folk women wed to Craster, who dwells with them in a keep in the haunted forest, beyond the Wall.

name: Dalla
description: Dalla is a wildling and the wife of Mance Rayder. She has a sister, Val.

name: Hempen Dan
description: Hempen Dan is a free folk raider.

name: Del
description: Del is a young free folk raider.

name: Devyn Sealskinner
description: Devyn Sealskinner is a free folk leader.

name: Dormund
description: Dormund is a son of Tormund.

name: Dryn
description: Dryn is a son of Tormund Giantsbane. He is about the same age as Bran Stark.

name: Dyah
description: Dyah is a wildling. She is one of the nineteen wives of Craster.

name: Errok
description: Errok is a wildling raider.

name: Ferny
description: Ferny is a wildling and one of the many wives of Craster.

name: Frenya
description: Frenya is a wildling spearwife.

name: Gavin the Trader
description: Gavin the Trader is a free folk leader.

name: Gendel
description: Gendel was a King-Beyond-the-Wall, a title he shared with his brother, Gorne. He lived three thousand years ago and led an invasion into the north with his brother.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood
description: Gerrick Kingsblood is a raider from the free folk and the founder of House Redbeard. He has a son and three daughters.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood's eldest daughter
description: Gerrick Kingsblood's first daughter is a member of the newly fashioned House Redbeard.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood's second daughter
description: Gerrick Kingsblood's second daughter is a member of the newly fashioned House Redbeard.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood's son
description: Gerrick Kingsblood's son is a member of the newly fashioned House Redbeard.

name: Gerrick Kingsblood's youngest daughter
description: Gerrick Kingsblood's youngest daughter is a member of the newly fashioned House Redbeard.

name: Gilly
description: Gilly is a wildling girl, a pregnant daughter of Craster and the youngest of his wives. In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Gilly is portrayed by Hannah Murray.

name: Gilly's mother
description: Gilly's mother is a wildling and one of the many wives of Craster. She is the mother of Gilly, and her given name is unknown.

name: Gorm the Wolf
description: Gorm the Wolf was one of the four chieftains who ruled Hardhome in the time prior to its destruction.

name: Gorne
description: Gorne was a King-Beyond-the-Wall, a title that he shared with his brother Gendel, three thousand years ago.

name: Great Walrus
description: The Great Walrus is a free folk leader among the the people of the Frozen Shore.

name: Grigg the Goat
description: Grigg the Goat is a free folk raider.

name: Grisella
description: Grisella was a female wildling skinchanger who could inhabit the body of a goat.

name: Haggon
description: Haggon was a free folk skinchanger.

name: Hali
description: Hali is a wildling spearwife.

name: Halleck
description: Halleck is a free folk raider. He is the brother of Harma Dogshead.

name: Harle the Handsome
description: Harle the Handsome is a leader of the free folk.

name: Harle the Huntsman
description: Harle the Huntsman is a leader of the free folk.

name: Harma Dogshead
description: Harma Dogshead, also known as Harma the Dogshead and Dogshead, is a known free folk raider. She has a brother, Halleck.

name: Henk the Helm
description: Henk the Helm is a free folk raider.

name: Holly
description: Holly is a wildling spearwife.

name: Horned Lord
description: The Horned Lord was a King-Beyond-the-Wall long before Bael the Bard. His given name is not known.

name: Howd Wanderer
description: Howd Wanderer is a free folk leader.

name: Jarl
description: Jarl is a free folk raider.

name: Jax
description: Jax is a member of the free folk of the haunted forest who joins the Night's Watch.

name: Joramun
description: Joramun was a legendary King-Beyond-the-Wall.

name: Kyleg of the Wooden Ear
description: Kyleg of the Wooden Ear is a free folk leader.

name: Leathers
description: Leathers  is a member of the free folk of the haunted forest who joins the Night's Watch.

name: Lenn
description: Lenn is a wildling raider.

name: Lenyl
description: Lenyl is a wildling raider. He is a part of the war band lead by Rattleshirt.

name: Lord of Bones
description:
The Lord of Bones, also mocked as Rattleshirt, is a free folk leader of renown. His given name is unknown.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, he is portrayed by Edward Dogliani (Seasons 2 and 3) and Ross O'Hennessy (Season 5).

name: Meha
description: Meha was the elder sister of Varamyr and Bump.

name: Monster
description:
The wildling infant son of Gilly and her father-husband Craster has not received a given name yet. Some members of the Night's Watch have called him the abomination, as he is a product of incest. Val thinks of him as a sweet little monster and the monster, using it as a milk name. Jon Snow then thinks of the infant as Monster.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, he is named Little Sam and portrayed by Arya Hasson (Season 3), William and James Wilson (Seasons 6 - 7), and Finn and Logan

name: Morna White Mask
description: Morna White Mask is a free folk leader, warrior witch, and raider.

name: Mother Mole
description: Mother Mole is a wildling leader and woods witch who is given to prophecy. She makes her home in a burrow beneath a hollow tree.

name: Munda
description: Munda is  the daughter of Tormund Giantsbane, a chief of the free folk.

name: Myrtle
description: Myrtle is a wildling spearwife.

name: Nella
description: Nella is a wildling wife of Craster.

name: Nettles (free folk)
description: Nettles is a spearwife of the free folk.

name: Nightrunners
description: The Nightrunners are a clan of free folk who live beyond the Wall.

name: Orell
description:
Orell is a free folk raider and a skinchanger who controls an eagle.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Orell is portrayed by Mackenzie Crook.

name: Osha
description: Osha is a spearwife of the free folk from north of the Wall.  In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, she is portrayed by Natalia Tena.

name: Quenn
description: Quenn  is a member of the free folk.

name: Quort
description: Quort is a wildling raider.

name: Ragwyle
description: Ragwyle is a wildling spearwife.

name: Mance Rayder
description:
Mance Rayder was once a man of the Night's Watch before breaking his vows and abandoning his post. He has since become extremely influential among the free folk, and is called the "King-Beyond-the-Wall".
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Mance is portrayed by Ciarán Hinds.

name: Raymun Redbeard
description: Raymun Redbeard was a King-Beyond-the-Wall. He is renowned for having led an invasion of the north in the time of Jon Snow's grandfather's grandfather.

name: Red Raven (free folk)
description: The Red Raven was a member of the free folk and was the younger brother of Raymun Redbeard, a legendary King-Beyond-the-Wall. He is an ancestor of House Redbeard. His given name is unknown.

name: Rowan
description: Rowan is a spearwife of the free folk.

name: Ryk
description: Ryk, known as Longspear Ryk, is a free folk raider and a member of Rattleshirt's war band.

name: Sigorn
description: Sigorn is the son of Styr, the Magnar of Thenn.

name: Soren Shieldbreaker
description: Soren Shieldbreaker is a free folk leader.

name: Squirrel (free folk)
description: Squirrel is a spearwife of the free folk.

name: Stone Thumbs
description: Stone Thumbs is a wildling raider.

name: Styr
description:
Styr is the Magnar of Thenn and leader of the Thenns, a tribe of free folk.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Styr is portrayed by Yuri Kolokolnikov.

name: Sylas the Grim
description: Sylas the Grim was a free folk raider during King Aegon III Targaryen's regency.

name: Thenns
description: The Thenns are the inhabitants of Thenn, a mountain valley in the peaks of the Frostfangs, beyond the Wall.

name: Thistle
description: Thistle is a wildling spearwife.

name: Toefinger
description: Toefinger is a wildling raider.

name: Toregg
description: Toregg, called Toregg the Tall and Tall Toregg, is the eldest son of Tormund Giantsbane.

name: Tormund
description:
Tormund, often called Tormund Giantsbane or Tormund Thunderfist, is a famous free folk raider from Ruddy Hall. He has four sons, Toregg, Torwynd, Dryn, and Dormund, and one daughter, Munda.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Tormund is portrayed by Kristofer Hivju.

name: Torwynd
description: Torwynd, known as Torwynd the Tame, is a son of Tormund.

name: Val
description: Val is a member of the free folk. She is the sister of Dalla, the wife of Mance Rayder.

name: Weeper
description: The Weeper, also known as the Weeping Man, is a notorious free folk raider and leader of a war band.

name: Willow Witch-eye
description: Willow, better known as Willow Witch-eye is a wildling spearwife.

name: Wisewoman's daughter
description: A wisewoman's daughter was a wildling healer in a village beyond the Wall.

name: Ygon Oldfather
description: Ygon Oldfather is a wildling clan chief.

name: Ygritte
description:
Ygritte is a spearwife of the free folk. She is a member of Rattleshirt's war band.
In the television adaptation Game of Thrones, Ygritte is portrayed by Rose Leslie.
